title: Cockpit MCP Keyword Dictionary
description: Schema for Stage 1 keyword classification dictionaries used by Cockpit MCP's two-stage classifier. Each category maps a list of keywords (= service names, vendor names, common 摘要 patterns) to a 勘定科目 + 税区分.

tax_jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for tax regime

tax_code_default.description: Default tax_code if no per-keyword override (= freee 税区分 ID)

name_ja.description: Japanese display name (= 勘定科目名)

freee_account_code.description: freee 勘定科目 ID (= account_item_id in freee API)

mf_account_code.description: Money Forward 勘定科目 ID (optional, set when freee + MF mapping confirmed)

default_tax_code.description: freee 税区分 ID (= tax_code, e.g., 0=対象外, 1=課税仕入8%, 2=課税仕入10%)

amount_threshold_min.description: Minimum amount (JPY) — below this, transaction does NOT match this category. Used for tiered rules like 会議費 (≤¥10K) vs 交際費 (>¥10K).

amount_threshold_max.description: Maximum amount (JPY) — above this, transaction does NOT match this category. Used for fixed-asset thresholds like 事務用品費 (<¥100K) vs 備品 (≥¥100K).

amount_overflow_category.description: If amount exceeds amount_threshold_max, auto-redirect to this category id (e.g., 会議費 → 交際費).

special_pattern.description: Custom matching logic that requires more than keyword substring (= e.g., '振込+カナ人名 → 外注費' requires regex + name detection)

keywords.description: List of substrings to match against normalized 摘要 (= 全角→半角 + lowercase). Order matters for priority within the same category. Across categories, the FIRST matching category wins (= top categories take priority).
